title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Whirlpool India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Whirlpool India are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Whirlpool India:
Whirlpool India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Whirlpool India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
